name: Tuna Fish Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes and set aside to cool.
2. Drain the tuna.
3. Mash the potatoes and mix in the tuna.
4. Add egg, salt, pepper, garlic powder, parsley flakes, and chives. Mix well.
5. Refrigerate for a while.
6. Make patties the size of a regular hamburger and coat both sides with flour.
7. Fry in 1/4 inch of cooking oil on medium heat. Turn when golden brown and fry the other side.
8. Drain on paper towels.
9. Serve hot.
